name: WaterChemistryDataProcessing
label: Water Chemistry Data Processing
description: Runs three sequential water-chemistry processing stages in one component: transformation of validated Excel templates into site-level CSV files, application of laboratory limits of quantification (LOQ/2 substitution), and conversion of recognised analytes to mg/l, µg/l and µeq/l. The three scientific scripts remain separate and are coordinated internally.

parameters.name: param_WeightedConductivity
parameters.label: LOQ Weighted Conductivity (µS/cm)
parameters.description: Limit of quantification for weighted conductivity, in µS/cm.

parameters.name: param_NH4N
parameters.label: LOQ NH4-N (mg/L)
parameters.description: Limit of quantification for ammonium nitrogen (NH4-N), in mg/L.

parameters.description: Limit of quantification for nitrate (NO3), in mg/L.

inputs.name: input-data
inputs.label: Validated water chemistry data ZIP
inputs.description: ZIP produced by the data-format validation component. It may contain the validated Excel templates directly or under an input_data folder.

outputs.name: output-data
outputs.label: Preprocessed water chemistry data ZIP
outputs.description: Final tab-separated CSV files after data transformation, LOQ substitution and unit expansion.

outputs.name: loq-log
outputs.label: LOQ substitution log
outputs.description: Tab-separated traceability log containing each value replaced by LOQ / 2.

outputs.name: pipeline-log
outputs.label: Pipeline execution log
outputs.description: Execution messages grouped by the three internal processing stages.

author: LifeWatch ERIC
